question: Are pharmacists qualified to provide medical services like vaccinations and health screenings?
topic: Corrects misconceptions about pharmacist training and capabilities that limit healthcare access

discovery_sources.text: Over 70% of all Americans receive vaccinations from pharmacies or pharmacists - verify current vaccination administration statistics

discovery_sources.text: Most Americans live within five miles of a community pharmacy - verify geographic accessibility data
